heading: Omitted
label: 1341 to 1348 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1341, , , which provided authorization for an executive agreement between United States and Republic of Philippines concerning trade and other related matters, was omitted in view of expiration of revised agreement concerning trade and other related matters which occurred on .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40160 Stat. 151July 4, 1974Section 1342, , , specified obligations of Philippines. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40260 Stat. 152section 1341 of this titleSection 1343, , , specified obligations of United States. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40360 Stat. 153section 1341 of this titleSection 1344, , , related to provisions concerning termination of agreement. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40460 Stat. 153section 1341 of this titleSection 1345, , , provided that upon expiration of agreement the provisions of subchapter I of this chapter shall cease to have effect. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40560 Stat. 154section 1341 of this titleSection 1346, , , related to interpretation of agreement. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40660 Stat. 154section 1341 of this titleSection 1347, , , related to termination of authority to make the agreement. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40760 Stat. 154section 1341 of this titleSection 1348, , , related to effective date of the agreement. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40860 Stat. 154section 1341 of this title
